title: Upgrade web UI to React + Vite + shadcn/ui project scaffold
acceptance_criteria: Vite project scaffolded in web/ directory with React 18 + TypeScript
npm run dev starts dev server with hot reload
npm run build produces dist/ with static assets
Server updated to serve from kb/web/dist/ in production, fallback to ui.html in dev
Existing ui.html functionality preserved as fallback
